name: ChkStart_LINWakeupRetryViolation
title: ChkStart_LINWakeupRetryViolation
syntax: dword ChkStart_LINWakeupRetryViolation (duration TimeoutAfterWakeup, duration TimeoutAfterThreeWakeups, float Tolerance, dword MaxRetryNum, char[] CaplCallback);
dword ChkStart_LINWakeupRetryViolation (duration TimeoutAfterWakeup, duration TimeoutAfterThreeWakeups, float Tolerance, dword MaxRetryNum);
description: Checks number of LIN wake-up signals and the time between them.
An event will be generated, if

parameters.description: Timeout between two consecutive retransmissions shall not be checked
Timeout after each three retransmissions shall not be checked

parameters.name: Tolerance
parameters.description: Allowed tolerance for timeout values Value range: [0 .. 100] Unit: percents [%] Default: 14%.
Maximum number of retransmissions shall not be checked

parameters.name: CaplCallback
parameters.description: Name of CAPL callback function to be called on generated event. In simulation nodes this parameter has to be set. In test modules this parameter is optional.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
